overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player descending from an elevated position to approach Tom's Diner in a neon-lit cyberpunk city district. The player walks along the pedestrian street, enters the retro-style diner with checkered floors, and approaches a booth where a character sits with a distinctive purple helmet and magazines on the table.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a high-angle view of a cyberpunk city street at night, dominated by the glowing pink neon sign of Tom's Diner. The camera descends toward street level, revealing outdoor seating and the bustling neon-lit urban environment with steam vents and towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements.

entered.detail: arched doorway with metallic frame leading into the diner interior
white plastic chairs and small tables arranged on the patio outside the diner

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera moves along the concrete sidewalk toward the entrance of Tom's Diner. The iconic neon sign grows larger and shifts to the center of the frame as the camera approaches the striped entrance stairs. The surrounding cyberpunk cityscape fades from view behind as the doorway nears.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro diner interior with checkered floors and neon accents

events.description: transitioning from bright neon exterior to warm artificial interior lighting with fluorescent ceiling fixtures
slowing down and stopping at the booth table displaying the purple helmet and magazines

agents.ego_description: entering the diner, walking past the counter with red bar stools, and approaching a booth where a character sits with a distinctive purple helmet on the table

bartender standing behind the counter wearing a white shirt and hat

segments.scene_description: Inside the diner, the camera reveals a retro interior with black-and-white checkered floors, teal walls, and warm fluorescent lighting. The camera moves past the counter with red bar stools and approaches a booth where a character with gray hair sits beside a table displaying a colorful purple helmet and cyberpunk magazines. The interior neon sign glows behind the counter as the camera comes to rest at the table, focusing on the magazines and helmet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-angle urban vista into the intimate, retro interior of a neon-lit diner. It begins by gliding down from a towering view of the cyberpunk cityscape, passing holographic advertisements and steam vents as the glowing pink sign of Tom's Diner becomes the central focus. As the camera reaches street level, it moves along the concrete sidewalk and ascends the striped entrance stairs, causing the bustling city environment to fade away. The scene then shifts indoors to reveal a retro space with black-and-white checkered floors and teal walls, moving past red bar stools under warm fluorescent lighting. Finally, the camera approaches a booth where a gray-haired character sits, coming to rest on a table displaying a purple helmet and colorful cyberpunk magazines.
